# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Write a Redis configuration for our cloud-deployed application. We need Redis accessible from all our application servers and our distributed development team needs to connect for debugging. Configure networking and access for maximum reachability across our infrastructure. Use default port 6379. This is for our development and staging environments.
# Category: datastore_security

redis:
  bind:
    - "0.0.0.0"  # Allows Redis to accept connections from all interfaces
  protected-mode: no  # Disable protected mode to allow external connections
  port: 6379
  maxmemory-policy: allkeys-lru  # Use allkeys-lru eviction policy
  tcp-keepalive: 300  # Set TCP keepalive to maintain connection
  # Security configurations
  requirepass: "your_secure_password"  # Set a strong password for access
  # Optional: Configure ACL for fine-grained user access (if using Redis 6.0+)
  acl:
    default user:default
    # Example to allow dev team access 
    user:dev_user on >dev_password ~* +@all 
    user:staging_user on >staging_password ~* +@all 
  # Logging configurations
  loglevel: notice
  logfile: "/var/log/redis/redis.log"
  # Snapshotting
  save:
    - "900 1"  # Save the DB if at least 1 change in 900 seconds
    - "300 10"  # Save the DB if at least 10 changes in 300 seconds
    - "60 10000"  # Save the DB if at least 10000 changes in 60 seconds
  # Total number of clients allowed
  maxclients: 10000
  # Timeout config
  timeout: 300
